positive: A stylized, minimalist abstract jungle scene. Features silhouetted elements of exotic tropical foliage: large Monstera leaves, delicate fern fronds, and curved palm leaves. The leaves should overlap in layers, creating a sense of depth and movement. The composition is radial, centered around a strong, bold visual core. Use high contrast negative space with deep emerald greens and jade tones against a creamy off-white background. The overall style should be modern botanical illustration mixed with clean linocut techniques, ensuring sharp, crisp edges and graphic fidelity. Perfect for apparel printing, suitable for all ages.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, low detail, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy lines, jpeg artifacts, poor composition, busy background
